steps: Go to https://app.attio.com and log in to your workspace
Click the dropdown beside your workspace name in the top-left corner
Click the 'Developers' tab in the left sidebar
Enter a name for the token and configure the required scopes
Click 'Create token' and copy the token immediately — it is only shown once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Attio workspace access token, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'

notes: You must be a workspace Admin to create access tokens
Token is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
Tokens have no expiry by default but can be revoked from the Developers page
Scopes are not assigned by default — you must configure them per token
Free tier available with limited seats

test_endpoint.description: Identify the current token, workspace, and permissions
